message.content:
Edit the file `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBSDI-director_create.adoc` to replace inline `{rbbc_call} setIamPolicy` references with the new `rbtoe_iam_grant_*` linked terms. Only change the lines I specify — preserve all surrounding context, role details, and NOTEs.

**Replacement 1** (lines 96-97): Director project grant
Change:
```
.. {rbbc_call}
link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/setIamPolicy[projects.setIamPolicy] for
```
To:
```
.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_project} for
```

**Replacement 2** (lines 136-139): Director → Mason SA impersonation
Change:
```
.. {rbbc_call}
link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/setIamPolicy[serviceAccounts.setIamPolicy] for
{rbtr_mason}
service account
```
To:
```
.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_sa} on
{rbtr_mason}
service account
```

**Replacement 3** (lines 148-150): Director bucket grant
Change:
```
.. {rbbc_call}
link:https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/json_api/v1/buckets/setIamPolicy[buckets.setIamPolicy] for
{rbtgi_build_bucket}
```
To:
```
.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_bucket} on
{rbtgi_build_bucket}
```

Read the file first to verify exact content, then make each edit. Do NOT touch the Secret Manager section (lines 107-124) or the repository section (lines 157-169) — those use "complete policy write" patterns and stay as-is.

content.text: Let me read the file first to verify the exact content at the specified lines.
Content verified. Now I'll make the three replacements.

content.content:
93→
    94→//axhos_step
    95→. *Grant Project-Level Permissions*:
    96→.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_project} for
    97→{rbrr_depot_project_id}
    98→.. Add `serviceAccount:«DIRECTOR_EMAIL»` with roles:
    99→... `roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor` (submit and manage builds)
   100→... `roles/viewer` (read project resources)
   101→.. Policy version: 3
   102→.. {rbbc_require}
   103→IAM policy update successful
   104→
   105→//axhos_step
   106→. *Grant Secret Manager Access for Inscribe*:
   107→.. NOTE:
   108→{rbtr_director}
   109→needs to fetch the API token from Secret Manager during
   110→{rbtgo_rubric_inscribe}
   111→to construct authenticated git URLs.
   112→.. {rbbc_call}
   113→link:https://cloud.google.com/secret-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.secrets/getIamPolicy[secrets.getIamPolicy] for `projects/{rbrr_depot_project_id}/secrets/RBGC_CBV2_API_TOKEN_SECRET_NAME`
   114→.. {rbbc_require}
   115→HTTP 200 — existing policy must be read successfully before modification. Die on failure; a silent fallback to empty policy would destroy existing bindings (e.g., the Cloud Build service agent binding set by {rbtgo_depot_create}).
   116→.. *Complete policy write*: Add ALL expected `secretAccessor` bindings to the read policy, regardless of what the read returned:
   117→... `serviceAccount:«DIRECTOR_EMAIL»` — Director needs secret access for inscribe
   118→... `serviceAccount:service-«PROJECT_NUMBER»@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com` — Cloud Build service agent needs secret access at build time
   119→.. NOTE: This complete-policy-write pattern prevents the IAM eventual consistency race: if `getIamPolicy` returns stale data missing the CB service agent binding (set by {rbtgo_depot_create}), the `setIamPolicy` still includes it.
   120→.. {rbbc_call}
   121→link:https://cloud.google.com/secret-manager/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.secrets/setIamPolicy[secrets.setIamPolicy] with the complete expected policy
   122→.. {rbbc_require}
   123→IAM policy set with all expected secretAccessor bindings
   124→
   125→//axhos_step
   126→. *Grant
   127→{rbtr_mason}
   128→Impersonation*:
   129→.. NOTE:
   130→{rbtr_director}
   131→submits builds that execute as
   132→{rbtr_mason}.
   133→This requires `serviceAccountUser` permission on
   134→{rbtr_mason}.
   135→.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_sa} on
   136→{rbtr_mason}
   137→service account
   138→.. Add `serviceAccount:«DIRECTOR_EMAIL»` with `roles/iam.serviceAccountUser`
   139→.. {rbbc_require}
   140→IAM binding successful
   141→
   142→//axhos_step
   143→. *Grant
   144→{rbtgi_build_bucket}
   145→Access*:
   146→.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_bucket} on
   147→{rbtgi_build_bucket}
   148→.. Add `serviceAccount:«DIRECTOR_EMAIL»` with roles:
   149→... `roles/storage.objectCreator` (upload sources)
   150→... `roles/storage.objectViewer` (verify uploads)
   151→.. {rbbc_require}
   152→bucket IAM update successful
   153→
   154→//axhos_step
   155→. *Grant
   156→{rbtgi_repository}
   157→Admin Access*:
   158→.. {rbbc_call}
   159→link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/setIamPolicy[repositories.setIamPolicy] for
   160→{rbtgi_repository}
   161→.. *Complete policy write*: Add ALL expected bindings to the read policy, regardless of what the read returned:
   162→... `serviceAccount:«DIRECTOR_EMAIL»` with `roles/artifactregistry.repoAdmin` — Director manages images
   163→... `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/artifactregistry.writer` — Mason pushes images at build time
   164→.. NOTE: Same complete-policy-write pattern as the secret IAM step. Prevents stale read from overwriting Mason's writer binding set by {rbtgo_depot_create}.
   165→.. {rbbc_require}
   166→repository IAM set with all expected bindings
   167→

content.text:
All three replacements applied correctly:

1. **Line 96**: `{rbtoe_iam_grant_project} for` (was `{rbbc_call}` + `projects.setIamPolicy` link)
2. **Line 135**: `{rbtoe_iam_grant_sa} on` (was `{rbbc_call}` + `serviceAccounts.setIamPolicy` link)
3. **Line 146**: `{rbtoe_iam_grant_bucket} on` (was `{rbbc_call}` + `buckets.setIamPolicy` link)

The Secret Manager section (lines 105-123) and repository section (lines 154-166) are untouched, preserving their complete-policy-write patterns with inline `{rbbc_call}` links.
